name: Bank of Central Florida
description_short: Community bank in Central Florida offering personal and business banking with FDIC insurance, relationship-focused service, and dedicated account managers.
description_long: Bank of Central Florida is a community-based bank operating in the Central Florida region, positioned as an alternative to larger national banks. The bank emphasizes relationship banking over transactional service, assigning each client a dedicated Relationship Manager for personalized support. Founded on the principle of understanding local markets and maintaining direct decision-making authority at the branch level, the bank serves both personal and business customers seeking a more hands-on banking experience. The bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking services including personal banking with checking and savings products, business banking solutions, treasury management services for business clients, and credit products (consumer and business credit cards). They provide ATM access with no fees on debit card withdrawals and feature online and mobile banking platforms. All deposits are FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. Their routing number is 063116261. Bank of Central Florida differentiates itself through its relationship-focused model, claiming to address common banking frustrations: poor communication, unsuitable product recommendations, unfamiliarity with local markets, and slow decision-making. The bank emphasizes authenticity, reliability through dedicated relationship managers, and a combination of technology with security. They highlight client testimonials and case studies showing partnerships with local businesses. While the website presents a strong value proposition for relationship banking, specific details about account minimums, fee schedules, interest rates, loan terms, and product-specific features are not available from the provided website content. The bank appears genuinely committed to local banking but potential customers would need to contact them directly for comprehensive product and pricing information. As a smaller regional bank, they may have more limited service hours or branch locations compared to national competitors.
services: ATM access with no debit card fees
pros: Dedicated Relationship Manager assigned to each client for personalized service
FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government full faith and credit
No ATM fees when using debit card at any ATM
Local decision-making authority rather than remote corporate approval
Comprehensive business banking and treasury management services for companies
Online and mobile banking platforms available for personal and business accounts
Focus on understanding local market and client-specific financial goals
cons: Limited branch locations likely compared to national banks (no specific count provided)
Website lacks key details on account minimums, fees, interest rates, and loan terms
No information about 24/7 customer support availability or support channels
Smaller bank may have limitations on product offerings compared to major national banks
Website does not specify loan products, credit limits, or lending criteria
best_for: Small to mid-size business owners seeking personalized banking relationships
Central Florida individuals wanting local decision-making and relationship banking
Companies needing treasury management and business cash flow services
Customers frustrated with impersonal service at large national banks
diagnosis: Bank of Central Florida is best for small-to-mid-size business owners and Central Florida residents who prioritize personalized service and local relationships over convenience of national branch networks. The main caveat is that essential banking details (fees, rates, minimums, specific loan products) are not disclosed on their website, requiring direct contact for accurate product and pricing comparisons.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_holding_company: BANK OF CENTRAL FL HOLDING CO
